description: Curated eval prompts for the embedded <RepullAgent /> chat widget shipped via @repull/ai-sdk. Each item is a self-contained property-manager scenario with deterministic acceptance checks. Grow this file over time; never delete IDs (mark deprecated:true instead) so historical baselines remain comparable.

prompts.prompt: What's my total revenue this month?
prompts.expected_intent: Call getRevenue with this calendar month's range; surface the total + currency breakdown.

prompts.prompt: How does this month's revenue compare to last month?
prompts.expected_intent: Two getRevenue calls (this month, last month). Lead with delta.

prompts.prompt: How much revenue have I booked year-to-date?
prompts.expected_intent: getRevenue with from=Jan 1 of current year, to=today.

prompts.prompt: What was my April revenue this year vs last year?
prompts.expected_intent: Two getRevenue calls covering April this year and last year.

prompts.prompt: What's my occupancy rate this month?
prompts.expected_intent: Call getOccupancyRate with this month's range.

prompts.prompt: What's tonight's occupancy across all my listings?
prompts.expected_intent: getOccupancyRate with from=today, to=today (or getReservations for tonight).

prompts.prompt: How does my pacing look for the next 30 days?
prompts.expected_intent: getOccupancyRate from=today, to=today+30.

prompts.prompt: How booked am I for July and August?
prompts.expected_intent: getOccupancyRate covering Jul-Aug of the current year.

prompts.prompt: Who's checking in today?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations with from=today, to=today, status=confirmed.

prompts.prompt: When does my next checkout happen?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations spanning today forward; return the soonest checkout.

prompts.prompt: How many bookings do I have this week?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations with this week's range.

prompts.prompt: Show me cancellations in the last 30 days.
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations status=cancelled, from=today-30, to=today.

prompts.prompt: Do I have any pending reservation requests?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations status=pending over a sensible forward window.

prompts.prompt: How many bookings does listing 4118 have next month?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations with listing_id=4118, range=next month.

prompts.prompt: What's the price for listing 4118 tonight?
prompts.expected_intent: getCurrentPricing listing_id=4118, date=today.

prompts.prompt: What is listing 4118 priced at next Saturday?
prompts.expected_intent: getCurrentPricing listing_id=4118, date=next saturday.

prompts.prompt: How is my pricing for listing 4118 in Lisbon vs the market this weekend?
prompts.expected_intent: getCurrentPricing for the listing AND getMarketContext city=Lisbon.

prompts.prompt: Is the Lisbon, Portugal market hot this week?
prompts.expected_intent: getMarketContext city=Lisbon, country=Portugal. Lead with comp price + occupancy band.

prompts.prompt: What are comp prices in Austin, US right now?
prompts.expected_intent: getMarketContext city=Austin, country=US.

prompts.prompt: Which guests have booked with me more than once?
prompts.expected_intent: searchGuests with a sensible query (e.g. 'repeat' or empty); surface guests with reservation_count > 1.

prompts.prompt: Look up guest John Smith for me.
prompts.expected_intent: searchGuests query=John Smith.

prompts.prompt: Find the guest with email alice@example.com.
prompts.expected_intent: searchGuests query=alice@example.com.

prompts.prompt: Who's cleaning today?
prompts.expected_intent: getCleaningRota date=today.

prompts.prompt: What turnovers do I have tomorrow?
prompts.expected_intent: getCleaningRota date=tomorrow.

prompts.prompt: Are there any cleanings still in progress today?
prompts.expected_intent: getCleaningRota date=today, then filter on status=in-progress.

prompts.prompt: Give me a revenue and occupancy snapshot for this month.
prompts.expected_intent: Call BOTH getRevenue and getOccupancyRate for this month's range.

prompts.prompt: What's coming in today and who's cleaning it?
prompts.expected_intent: getReservations today + getCleaningRota today.

prompts.prompt: Pull up everything for guest Alice Johnson — past stays and contact info.
prompts.expected_intent: searchGuests query=Alice Johnson; optionally getReservations to enrich.

prompts.prompt: ¿Cuánto he facturado este mes?
prompts.expected_intent: Spanish-language revenue query — call getRevenue and reply in Spanish.

prompts.prompt: ¿Quién llega hoy a alojarse?
prompts.expected_intent: Spanish-language arrivals query — call getReservations and reply in Spanish.
